'''fanoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaaltagh|quaaltagh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaaltagh|quaaltagh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fanoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæneyeth|fæneyeth]] || [[word:fæneyej|fæneyej]] || [[word:fæneyesh|fæneyesh]] || [[word:fæneye|fæneye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanonoyoth|fanonoyoth]] || [[word:fanonoyoj|fanonoyoj]] || [[word:fanonoyosh|fanonoyosh]] || [[word:fanonoyo|fanonoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanoyoth|fanoyoth]] || [[word:fanoyoj|fanoyoj]] || [[word:fanoyosh|fanoyosh]] || [[word:fanoyo|fanoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanofyoth|fanofyoth]] || [[word:fanofyoj|fanofyoj]] || [[word:fanofyosh|fanofyosh]] || [[word:fanofyof|fanofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fanoyotho|fanoyotho]] || [[word:fanoyojo|fanoyojo]] || [[word:fanoyosho|fanoyosho]] || [[word:fanoyoko|fanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fanoyoth|fanoyoth]] || [[word:fanoyoj|fanoyoj]] || [[word:fanoyosh|fanoyosh]] || [[word:fanoyo|fanoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fanoyothol|fanoyothol]] || [[word:fanoyojol|fanoyojol]] || [[word:fanoyoshol|fanoyoshol]] || [[word:fanoyokol|fanoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fanoyothotho|fanoyothotho]] || [[word:fanoyojojo|fanoyojojo]] || [[word:fanoyoshosho|fanoyoshosho]] || [[word:fanoyoko|fanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fanoyothon|fanoyothon]] || [[word:fanoyojon|fanoyojon]] || [[word:fanoyoshon|fanoyoshon]] || [[word:fanoyokon|fanoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fanoyothoro|fanoyothoro]] || [[word:fanoyojoro|fanoyojoro]] || [[word:fanoyoshoro|fanoyoshoro]] || [[word:fanoyokoro|fanoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
